name: K-12 HCM Platform Modernization
client: Confidential — Leading US K-12 HCM Provider
description: End-to-end modernization of a large-scale K-12 Human Capital Management platform serving US school districts. Unified Recruiting & Hiring, Central Document Management (CDM), and HRMS products on a modern event-driven, cloud-native architecture.

products.name: Recruiting & Hiring
products.description: Applicant tracking, job posting, onboarding workflows, background check integration, and certification tracking purpose-built for K-12 district hiring at scale

products.name: Central Document Management (CDM)
products.description: FERPA-compliant employee document storage, digital records management, and automated document lifecycle for school district HR teams

products.name: HRMS
products.description: Employee lifecycle management, benefits administration, position management, and compensation workflows for K-12 HR operations

highlights: Scaled engineering from 0 to 100+ across onshore and offshore teams
Unified HR product pillars through Kafka, AWS, and API gateway integration
AWS Bedrock RAG systems achieving 95%+ structured data extraction accuracy
Claude Code and GitHub Copilot guilds improving delivery productivity 30%+
Reduced operational incidents 45% through observability and proactive monitoring

name: Agribusiness Management Platform
client: Confidential — Leading North American Agribusiness Software Provider
description: Cloud-native serverless platform for an integrated agribusiness management suite serving agricultural co-ops and retailers across North America. Delivered Agronomy, Grain, Grower Portal, and Accounting modules on AWS serverless infrastructure with cross-platform mobile for field teams.

products.name: Agronomy
products.description: Field management, soil sampling, precision crop plans, prescription management, custom application tracking, and agronomic analytics for agri-retailers

products.name: Grain
products.description: Grain elevator management including scale tickets, contracts, position tracking, settlement processing, and storage management for co-ops

products.name: Grower Portal
products.description: Grower-facing mobile and web portal for account visibility, field maps, agronomic data, grain positions, and invoice access — offline-first for field connectivity

products.name: Accounting
products.description: Integrated financial operations for ag co-ops covering accounts receivable, accounts payable, general ledger, and payroll workflows

highlights: Serverless AWS architecture (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, SQS, Cognito, S3) supporting $5M+ annual operations
Cross-platform mobile serving 50K+ agricultural professionals with 4.5+ star ratings
Offline-first mobile architecture for field operations in low-connectivity environments
Data warehouse and ETL pipelines enabling predictive crop optimization and yield forecasting models
Docker-based integration testing framework achieving 80%+ coverage across 20+ microservices
Modernized legacy VB.NET WinForms desktop suite to cloud-native web platform on Angular 18 with agGrid for complex data grids

name: Precision Agriculture & Genomics Platform
description: Solution architecture for a precision agriculture and genomics platform supporting crop breeding programs, field trial management, genomic data pipelines, and commercial trait deployment for large-scale agricultural operations.

products.name: Genomics & Breeding Pipeline
products.description: Genomic data management and molecular breeding workflows supporting trait selection, genotyping integration, and breeding program optimization

products.name: Field Trial Management
products.description: End-to-end field trial planning, phenotyping data capture, experimental design, and multi-location trial result analysis

products.name: Commercialization Workflows
products.description: Trait pipeline tracking from discovery through regulatory approval to commercial seed deployment

highlights: Designed cloud-native architecture for genomics data pipelines handling large-scale biological datasets
Integrated field data collection with laboratory genomics systems for end-to-end breeding traceability
Established scalable data platform for multi-location trial data aggregation and analytics

name: Farm Operations Platform & Integrations
description: Solution architecture for a farm operations platform and third-party integrations for a large-scale fresh produce company. Covered harvest management, supply chain visibility, cold chain logistics, labor operations, and retail/distribution integrations across multi-country farming operations.

products.name: Farm Operations Management
products.description: Harvest tracking, field workforce management, and farm-level operational data collection across large-scale growing operations

products.name: Supply Chain & Cold Chain
products.description: End-to-end supply chain visibility from harvest to retail, including cold chain monitoring, logistics coordination, and distribution integrations

products.name: Retail & Partner Integrations
products.description: Integrations with retail supply chain systems, food safety and compliance platforms, and third-party logistics providers

highlights: Architected integration layer connecting farm operations, cold chain logistics, and retail distribution systems
Designed scalable data flows for multi-country, multi-site farm operations with real-time visibility
Established API gateway and event-driven patterns for third-party retail and logistics integrations

name: Logistics Platform Modernization
client: Confidential — Regional Freight Forwarding & Logistics Operator
description: Full platform rewrite of a freight forwarding and logistics operator's legacy system to a modern Blazor WASM/Server hybrid. Platform covers end-to-end freight operations including ocean and air freight, warehousing, cargo tracking, trucking dispatch, and household goods relocation — supporting high-volume daily transaction processing.

products.name: Freight Operations
products.description: Full Container Load (FCL) and Less Than Container Load (LCL) ocean and air freight management, shipment booking, and carrier coordination

products.name: Cargo Tracking Portal
products.description: Real-time cargo tracking and transit warehouse portal for customers and internal operations, replacing a legacy web system with a modern Blazor WASM interface

products.name: Warehousing & Distribution
products.description: Warehouse management and inventory operations for distribution centers, supporting inbound/outbound logistics, storage, and last-mile trucking dispatch

products.name: Household Goods & Project Cargo
products.description: Specialized logistics workflows for household goods relocation and oversized/project cargo including commercial and industrial equipment

highlights: Blazor WASM/Server hybrid replacing legacy .NET MVC system across freight, warehousing, and tracking modules
500K+ daily transactions at production scale across freight, warehouse, and dispatch operations
45% load time reduction improving dispatcher and customer portal responsiveness
$2M+ modernization investment secured on architecture proposal
Real-time cargo visibility via SignalR-powered tracking replacing batch-refresh legacy portal

name: Hospitality Loyalty Platform
description: Greenfield microservices loyalty platform on Azure Kubernetes Service using Domain-Driven Design, delivering MVP in 5 months for 100K+ members.

products.name: Member Loyalty Engine
products.description: Core loyalty program management covering member enrollment, points accrual, redemption workflows, tier management, and reward catalog for hospitality guests

products.name: Partner Integration Layer
products.description: API-first integration platform enabling hotel property systems, POS, and third-party hospitality vendors to connect with the loyalty engine via event-driven contracts

products.name: Member Portal
products.description: Member-facing web experience for account management, points balance, reward redemption, and stay history — built on REST APIs with sub-200ms response targets

highlights: MVP delivered in 5 months from greenfield
100K+ members at launch
99.95% uptime with sub-200ms response times
Domain-Driven Design on Azure Kubernetes Service

name: Xamarin Forms Custom Renderer Samples
description: Open source sample project showcasing custom renderer implementations in Xamarin Forms. Most-starred personal GitHub repository, referenced by the developer community for cross-platform mobile UI patterns.
highlights: 17 GitHub stars — most starred personal repository
Demonstrates custom renderers for platform-specific UI in Xamarin Forms
Referenced as a learning resource by the Xamarin developer community

name: Dapper.Repository
description: Open source CRUD library wrapping Dapper and exposing a Repository pattern interface with auto-generated operations. Published on NuGet.
highlights: Auto-generated CRUD operations via Repository interface
Wrapper around Dapper for clean data-access patterns in .NET

name: AWS.RequestSigner
description: Utility library for generating AWS Signature V4 signed URLs to connect to AWS IoT via MQTT over WebSockets from .NET.
highlights: AWS Signature V4 implementation for IoT WebSocket connections
Fills .NET gap for connecting to AWS IoT Core via MQTT

name: MongoDbMigrations
description: Open source MongoDB schema migration library for .NET applications. Provides structured, version-controlled migration support for MongoDB collections published on NuGet.
highlights: Version-controlled schema migrations for MongoDB in .NET
Published on NuGet for the .NET developer community
